title: Sobriety Journal
subtitle: 90 Days to Clarity - A Daily Recovery Companion for Quitting Alcohol & Drugs
author: Deokgu Studio
description: Ninety days of guided pages for anyone choosing recovery. Daily prompts cover gratitude, triggers, cravings (0-10), mood, sleep, support contact, and one small win. Weekly check-ins surface patterns. Emergency Plan, trigger reference, and support directory live in the back so the book opens to help you in the hardest moments. Designed for adults quitting alcohol or drugs - works alongside AA, SMART Recovery, or solo recovery. Compact 6x9 size fits in a bag. Not medical advice; if physically dependent, consult a doctor or call SAMHSA 1-800-662-HELP.
categories: BISAC: SELF-HELP / Substance Abuse & Addictions / Alcohol
BISAC: SELF-HELP / Substance Abuse & Addictions / Drugs

niche_research.demand: very high - evergreen + Q1 New Year spike
validated_bestsellers: Sobriety Journal 90 Days to Clarity by Lia Vallenstein (B0GJTCQJLG)
niche_research.differentiator: Built-in Emergency Plan + Slip Log without shame + 30/60/90 milestone reflections
